title: Maybe an issue in the equivalence check

features.name: logical AND in equivalence check comparison
features.description: Code should include a logical AND operator (&&) used in a wire assignment within a design being compared for equivalence

features.name: bitwise AND in equivalence check gold design
features.description: Code should include a bitwise AND operator (&) used in a wire assignment within a reference design for equivalence comparison

features.name: single-bit logical vs bitwise operator equivalence
features.description: Code should include equivalent expressions using && and & on single-bit inputs that should produce identical results but are treated differently by Yosys optimizer
features.snippet:
wire w4_bitwise = ((i2 & i1) | (i2) | (i1));
wire w4_logical = ((i2 && i1) | (i2) | (i1));
